$comment: D-CSUBSET-THREAD-LOCAL (TLS C1 x86_64 + C2 arm64): single-thread thread_local witness — .tdata template copy visible before any write (g==7), mutation sticks, static thread_local (.tbss) accumulates from 0, thread_local const rides the same tp-relative access. The release arm runs the full optimizer over the tlsbase+lea access sequence (the M-5 riprel-fold exclusions must hold under CSE/mem2reg). The arm64 arm (TLS C2) runs the SAME source through the MRS TPIDR_EL0 + ADD/ADD hi12/lo12 Variant-I sequence under qemu-aarch64. pe64/Mach-O reject loud (K_FormatLacksThreadLocalSupport 0x8015) until C3/C4. The per-thread discriminator lives in thread_local_pthread; this example's job is the loader-copies-template + mutation semantics. Exit 42.
